##### **$report.isEmpty(obj)**

Test and return true if an object is null, empty string, or empty collection.

|  | Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter(s) | obj | java.lang.Object | An object being tested. |
| Return | - | boolean | True if the object is null, empty string, or empty collection. |

For example:

```text

```

#### NOTE: Note

Note

When checking HTML String format, **$report.isEmpty** ignores all ****, spaces, and line feeds in the returned tag value and returns **false** when there is one or more characters.

****

##### **$report.getBasicFlows(usecase:UseCase) : List<FlowStep>**

Find and return a list of basic flows from a given use case. If a use case scenario is not being used, it will retrieve the value from "requirementUseCase" stereotype tags.

|  | Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter(s) | usecase | com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdusecases.UseCase | A targeted Use Case. |
| Return | - | List<com.nomagic.magicdraw.usecasescenarios.scenarios.FlowStep> | A list of flow steps. A Flow Step is an object representing each step of a Use Case flow. |

The <FlowStep> is a "com.nomagic.magicdraw.usecasescenarios.scenarios.FlowStep" class.

The important properties of <FlowStep> are as follows:

- name prints a name of a current step, for example: $flowStep.name.
- element returns an element associates with a current step, for example: #set ($e = $flowStep.element).
- alternativeConditions returns a list of alternative steps <AlternativeCondition> from a current step, for example: #foreach ($alter in $flowStep.alternativeConditions) #end.
- exceptionTypes returns a list of exception steps <ExceptionType> from a current step, for example: #foreach ($alter in $flowStep.exceptionTypes) #end.

For example:

```text

```

****

##### **$report.getAlternativeFlows(usecase:UseCase) : List<FlowStep>**

Find and return all alternative flows from a given use case. The alternative flows will be listed from all possible branches of basic flows. If a use case scenario is not being used, it will retrieve the value from "requirementUseCase" stereotype tags.

|  | Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter(s) | usecase | com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdusecases.UseCase | A targeted Use Case. |
| Return | - | List<com.nomagic.magicdraw.usecasescenarios.scenarios.FlowStep> | A list of flow steps. A Flow Step is an object representing each step of a Use Case flow. |

For example:

```text

```

****

##### **$report.getExceptionalFlows(usecase:UseCase) : List<FlowStep>**

Find and return all exceptional flows from a given use case. The alternative flows will be listed from all possible branches of basic flows. If the use case scenario is not being used, it will retrieve the value from "requirementUseCase" stereotype tags.

|  | Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter(s) | usecase | com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdusecases.UseCase | A targeted Use Case. |
| Return | - | List<com.nomagic.magicdraw.usecasescenarios.scenarios.FlowStep> | A list of flow steps. A flow step is an object representing each steps of a Use Case flow. |

For example:

```text

```

****

##### **$report.getOwnedElementsIncludingAdditional(element, includePureOwned) : List<Element>**

This code returns owned elements of a given element including additional owned elements defined in the DSL specification by additionalContentProperty.

|  | Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Parameter(s) | element | com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element | A model element. |
|  | includePureOwned | java.lang.Boolean | True if includes an element owned directly in the ownedElement UML metaproperty. Otherwise False. |
| Return | - | java.util.List | A list of owned elements of a given element. |

The following are the examples of using the code.

```text

```

```text

```

```text

```

<ac:structured-macro ac:name="content-layer" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="4651e7ee-7804-49d1-b098-7230bfd52d1a"><ac:parameter ac:macro-id="b1ee1faa-fec1-4ec2-b49b-df74045a43df"><ac:parameter ac:name="id">1210344294</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><p>$report is a utility tool enabling a template to get the modeling tool data.</p><h3><strong>$report.createValueSpecificationText(specification)</strong></h3><p>Create texts representing the ValueSpecification element.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name</th><th>Type</th><th>Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)</strong></td><td>specification</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.ValueSpecification</td><td>A given Value <br />Specification.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A String value <br />for ValueSpecification.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.filterDiagram(diagramList, diagramTypes)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of diagrams from a list of diagrams filtered by types.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>diagramList</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of diagrams.</td></tr><tr><td>diagramTypes</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of diagram types <br />used as filters.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of filtered diagrams.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="dc7cd3c6-1a04-42d8-aa7a-4fcd7300c684"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Sample of $report.filterDiagram(diagramList, diagramTypes)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach($diagram in $report.filterDiagram($Diagram,["Class Diagram","Communication Diagram"]))
$diagram.name : $diagram.diagramType
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.filterElement(elementList, humanTypes)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of elements from a list of elements filtered by human types.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>elementList </td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of elements.</td></tr><tr><td>humanTypes</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of human types <br />used as filters.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td> -</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of filtered elements.</td></tr></tbody></table><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="06dabf73-ac30-4ea4-8726-2e02e1593514"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Note</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body>You can change the human type depending on the language used in the modeling tool. For example, &quot;Class&quot; is the human type of the classes in the English modeling tool while &quot;Classe&quot; is the human type for the classes in French. The specified humanTypes needs to be changed when you change the language used in the modeling tool.</ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="756985fd-adb2-42b1-b795-8f65c051634c"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">$report.filterElement(elementList, humanTypes)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach($element in $report.filterElement($elements, ["Use Case", "Actor"]))
$element.name : $element.humanType
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.filterElementType(elementList, elementType)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of elements from a list of elements filtered by element types.</p><p><br /></p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>elementList </td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of elements.</td></tr><tr><td>elementTypes</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of element types <br />used as filters.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td> -</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of filtered elements.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><h3><strong>$report.filter(elementList, propertyName, propertyValue)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of elements filtered by a specified property name.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col style="width: 119.0px;" /><col style="width: 113.0px;" /><col style="width: 139.0px;" /><col style="width: 217.0px;" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name  </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="3"><strong>Parameter(s)   </strong></td><td>elementList</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of elements. </td></tr><tr><td>propertyName</td><td>java.lang.String </td><td><p>A property name.</p></td></tr><tr><td>propertyValue </td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of property names <br />used as filters.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td><br /></td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of filtered elements.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example: </p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="dfed2cad-bbdf-451d-952a-eed83c2be494"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">$report.filter(elementList, propertyName, propertyValue)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach ($e in $report.filter($elements, "name", ["foo", "bar"]))
   $e.name
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.filterElementByStereotypeName(elementList, appliedStereotypeNameList)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of elements from a list of elements filtered by applied stereotype names.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><td><p><strong> </strong></p></td><td><p><strong>Name</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>Type</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>Description</strong></p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><p><strong>Parameter(s)</strong></p></td><td><p>elementList</p></td><td><p>java.util.Collection</p></td><td><p>A collection of elements.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>appliedStereotypeNameList</p></td><td><p>java.util.Collection</p></td><td><p>A collection of applied stereotype names.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Return</strong></p></td><td><p>-</p></td><td><p>java.util.Collection</p></td><td><p>A collection of filtered elements.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="857cc3d1-3cdc-4478-9ac4-0ffce9ec3c15"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">$report.filterElementByStereotypeName(elementList, appliedStereotypeNameList)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach($element in $report.filterElementByStereotypeName($elements, ["Stereotype A", "Stereotype B"]))
   $element.name
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.findElementInCollection(elementList, name)</strong></h3><p>Find an element from a collection of elements by name.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name</th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>elementList</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of elements.</td></tr><tr><td>name</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>An element name.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>- </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element instance. <br />If it cannot find the <br />element, it will return <br />a null value.</td></tr></tbody></table><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="dbb0f9ab-cbf0-4ce7-8bfd-3b29f6ad4c74"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#set($myClass = $report.findElementInCollection($Class, "MyClass"))
$myClass.humanType $myClass.name]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><br /></p><h3><strong>$report.findRelationship(modelPackage)</strong></h3><p>Search and /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type  </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>classifier</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Classifier</td><td>A classifier. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of relations.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getBaseClassifiers(child)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of base elements of a classifier.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>child</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Classifier</td><td>A child class. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return </strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection </td><td>A collection of base elements <br />(classifiers). </td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getClientElement(element)</strong></h3><p>Return a client of a relationship.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th> Type</th><th>Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)</strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element </td><td>A relationship model<br />element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element </td><td>The relationship’s client.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getComment(element)</strong></h3><p>Return a documentation of a given element.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>The documentation <br />of an element.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><strong><br /></strong></strong></p><h3><strong style="font-size: 16.0px;"><strong>$report.getCustomizationProperty(element, stereotypeName, propertyName)</strong></strong></h3><p>Get a customization property from the specified applied stereotype of the element.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="3"><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="1">stereotypeName</td><td colspan="1">java.lang.String</td><td colspan="1">A stereotype name.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="1">propertyName</td><td colspan="1">java.lang.String</td><td colspan="1">A property name.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.Object</td><td>A property tag value.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong style="font-size: 16.0px;"><strong>$report.getCustomizationPropertyString(element, stereotypeName, propertyName)</strong></strong></h3><p>Get a customization property as a String value from the specified applied stereotype of the element.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="3"><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="1">stereotypeName</td><td colspan="1">java.lang.String</td><td colspan="1">A stereotype name.</td></tr><tr><td colspan="1">propertyName</td><td colspan="1">java.lang.String</td><td colspan="1">A property name.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A property tag value as String.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getDerivedClassifiers(parent)</strong></h3><p>Return a collection of derived elements of a classifier.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>parent</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Classifier</td><td>A parent class.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>- </td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of <br />derived elements <br />(classifiers). </td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getDiagramElements(diagram)</strong></h3><p>Get a collection of elements from a diagram.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col style="width: 107.0px;" /><col style="width: 73.0px;" /><col style="width: 409.0px;" /><col style="width: 104.0px;" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)</strong></td><td>diagram</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Diagram</td><td>A diagram instance.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection <br />of elements in a diagram.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getDiagramType(diagram)</strong></h3><p>Return a diagram type.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th> Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>diagram</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Diagram</td><td>A diagram instance.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A diagram type.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getElementProperties(element)</strong></h3><p>Return a list of property names, including UML properties and properties that are customized through DSL customization.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of property names.</td></tr></tbody></table><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="6647c6f4-77ed-49ca-948c-2f7456883a81"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach($pp in $report.getElementProperties($element))
$pp.name > $pp.value
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="6f2ed9ae-4f8a-4502-8909-536441b7822a"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color: rgb(14,16,26);">By default, all properties are exported. They can be filtered by adding a &quot;STANDARD&quot; or &quot;EXPERT&quot; argument, e.g. </span><em><span style="color: rgb(14,16,26);">$report.getElementProperties($element, &quot;STANDARD&quot;).</span></em></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h3><strong>$report.getElementPropertiesName(element)</strong></h3><p>Return a list of property names, including UML properties and properties that are customized through DSL customization.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of property names.</td></tr></tbody></table><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="32491bca-cc8e-482e-b90d-9185887be999"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[#foreach($name in $report.getElementPropertiesName($element))
$name
#end]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p><p><br /></p><h3><strong>$report.getDSLProperty(element, propertyName)</strong></h3><p>Return a DSL property.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td>propertyName </td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A property <br />name. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.Object</td><td>A property <br />value.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getElementComment(element)</strong></h3><p>Return a comment attached to an element. If no comment is attached, it will return a null value.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return </strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Comment</td><td><p>A comment <br />instance of <br />the element.</p></td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getElementName(element)</strong></h3><p>Get an element’s name. If the name is empty, it will return &quot;&lt;unnamed&gt;&quot;. This method performs the following procedures:</p><ul><li>If the element is generalized from the NamedElement metaclass, it will return <em>$element.name</em></li><li>If the element is generalized from the Slot metaclass, it will return<em> $<span style="line-height: 1.42857;">element.definingFeature.name</span></em></li><li>If the element is a UML element, it will return <em>$element.humanName</em></li><li>Else returns <em>$element.toString()</em></li></ul><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name</th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>java.lang.Object</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return </strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>An element name.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getIconFor(element)</strong></h3><p>Return an image icon of an element with a default icon filename (“icon_”+element type).</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type  </th><th> Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.BaseElement </td><td>A modeling tool<br />element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.magicreport.Image</td><td>An image object <br />of the element's icon.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="128d8588-a024-435b-b1ef-d0c0e499c9d6"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">$report.getIconFor(element)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor($classObject)]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p>This results in an Image object of a class whose name is “icon_class”.</p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3>$report.getImageFor(element, dpi)</h3><p>Return an image with specified DPI of an element.</p><table class="relative-table wrapped" style="width: 43.1345%;"><colgroup><col style="width: 17.649%;" /><col style="width: 11.4654%;" /><col style="width: 46.1192%;" /><col style="width: 24.4767%;" /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th>Name </th><th>Type  </th><th> Description</th><th colspan="1">Description</th></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.BaseElement </td><td colspan="1"><span>A modeling tool</span><br /><span>element.</span></td></tr><tr><td colspan="1">dpi</td><td colspan="1">int</td><td colspan="1">DPI of the element image.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.magicreport.Image</td><td colspan="1"><span>An image object </span><br /><span>with specified DPI.</span></td></tr></tbody></table><ac:structured-macro ac:name="note" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="84b916e7-f028-496d-9974-ec0878d833a8"><ac:parameter ac:name="title">Note</ac:parameter><ac:rich-text-body><ul><li>The DPI value can be 1 to 4800.</li><li>If less than 1, the value is not taken, and the DPI set in *Template* and *Global* will be used respectively. See <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MD2024xR1" ri:content-title="Setting image DPI" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[setting image DPI]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link>.</li><li>If more than 4800, <span style="color: rgb(62,63,64);">the value will be rounded down to 4800</span>.</li></ul></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><br /></p><h3><strong>$report.getIconFor(element, prefix, suffix, hashCode)</strong></h3><p>Return an image icon of an element. The icon name depends on the <em><strong>hashCode</strong></em> value if <em><strong>hashCode</strong></em> equals true, the icon’s name is set as<em><strong> ”icon_”+hash</strong></em> code value of the icon. If the <em><strong>hashCode</strong> </em>value equals false, the icon name is set as</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><strong>Parameter(s)   </strong></td><td>element </td><td>com.nomagic.magicdraw.uml.BaseElement</td><td>A modeling tool element.</td></tr><tr><td>prefix</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A prefix of an icon name.</td></tr><tr><td>suffix</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A suffix of an icon name.</td></tr><tr><td>hashCode</td><td>boolean</td><td>If true, use hash code of an icon <br />as the icon name and exclude a <br />prefix or suffix from the name. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return </strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.magicreport.Image</td><td>An image object of <br />an element’s icon.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="7be74159-443d-47b0-a7f1-85a517d6b7d8"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">To get an icon and set a name for hash code</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor($classObject, “prefix_”, “_suffix”, true)]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><span>This results in an Image object of a class whose name “icon_24676200”. The number in the icon name is hash code, which is regenerated whenever the modeling tool starts.</span></p><p><br /></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="c28ec2e1-6a97-4fc4-9382-f979e47ad4ff"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">To get an icon and set a name for prefix and suffix</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor($classObject, “prefix_”, “_suffix”, false)]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><span>This results in an Image object of a class whose name is “prefix_class_suffix”.</span></p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getIconFor(type)</strong></h3><p>Return an image icon for an element type with a default icon’s filename ((“icon_”+element type).</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>type</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A type name.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td> -</td><td>com.nomagic.magicreport.Image</td><td>An image object for the element’s icon.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="f48f62e3-a5df-4e3e-9d77-4af01997fcf6"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">$report.getIconFor(type)</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor("class")]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p class="auto-cursor-target"><span>This results in an Image object of a class whose name is “icon_class”.</span></p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getIconFor(type, prefix, suffix, hashCode)</strong></h3><p>Return an image icon for an element type. The icon’s name depends on the <em><strong>hashCode</strong></em> value if <em><strong>hashCode</strong></em> equals true, the icon name is set as <em><strong>“icon_”+hash</strong></em> code value of the icon. If the <em><strong>hashCode</strong></em> value equals false, the icon name is set as <em><strong>prefix + element type + suffix</strong></em>.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>  Type</th><th> Description </th></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><strong>Parameter(s)</strong><strong> </strong><strong> </strong><strong> </strong></td><td>type</td><td>java.lang.String </td><td>A type name.</td></tr><tr><td>prefix</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A prefix for an icon name.</td></tr><tr><td>suffix</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A suffix for an icon name.</td></tr><tr><td>hashCode</td><td>boolean</td><td>If true, use hash code of<br />an icon as the icon’s name <br />and exclude a prefix <br />or suffix from the name.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>com.nomagic.magicreport.Image</td><td>An image object <br />for an element’s icon.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><br /></p><p>For example:</p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="95a8eee3-a1bb-4db7-939e-83cc8731e2a3"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">To get an icon and set a name for hash code</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor(“class”, “prefix_”, “_suffix”, true)]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><span>This results in an Image object of a class whose name “icon_24676200”. The number in the icon name is hash code, which is regenerated whenever the modeling tool starts.</span></p><p><br /></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="code" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="84549cb8-ec03-4c66-a7da-71f9d7d62d6c"><ac:parameter ac:name="language">text</ac:parameter><ac:parameter ac:name="title">To get an icon and set a name for prefix and suffix</ac:parameter><ac:plain-text-body><![CDATA[$report.getIconFor(“class”, “prefix_”, “_suffix”, false)]]></ac:plain-text-body></ac:structured-macro><p><span>This results in an Image object of a class whose name is “prefix_class_suffix”.</span></p><p><br /></p><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3>$report.getIncludeUseCase(useCase)</h3><p>Return a collection of included elements of a UseCase.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)  </strong></td><td>useCase </td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdusecases.UseCase</td><td>A UseCase <br />instance.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td> -</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection <br />of included <br />UseCases.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3>$report.getInnerElement(element)</h3><p>Return a collection of inner elements.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name  </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s)</strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An element.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of <br />inner elements. </td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getInteractionMessageType(message)</strong></h3><p>Return an interaction message type.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th> Name </th><th>Type </th><th>Description </th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>message</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.interactions.mdbasicinteractions.Message</td><td>A message <br />instance. </td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return</strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.lang.String</td><td>A message <br />type.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getMetaClass(stereotype)</strong></h3><p>Return a stereotype meta class.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name  </th><th>Type </th><th> Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>stereotype</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.mdprofiles.Stereotype</td><td>A stereotype <br />instance.</td></tr><tr><td><strong>Return </strong></td><td>-</td><td>java.util.Collection</td><td>A collection of <br />Meta Classes.</td></tr></tbody></table><p><strong><br /></strong></p><h3><strong>$report.getMetaClass(element)</strong></h3><p>Return an element meta class.</p><table class="wrapped"><colgroup><col /><col /><col /><col /></colgroup><tbody><tr><th><br /></th><th>Name  </th><th>Type </th><th> Description</th></tr><tr><td><strong>Parameter(s) </strong></td><td>element</td><td>com.nomagic.uml2.ext.magicdraw.classes.mdkernel.Element</td><td>An
